title: Thāna Bhawan Heat Wave
lead: Thāna Bhawan is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +4.71. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme temperatures.
body:
The current heat wave in Thāna Bhawan is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 15.5 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 47%, and wind speed is 11.1 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 The HDD is 0.0 GG, indicating no cooling degree days, making the situation even more severe.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
